title: Evaluation of Regional Care Cooperatives: phase 1
body: "This report presents findings from the first phase of the evaluation (April 2024 to April 2025), bringing together:   findings from interviews with key Regional Care Cooperative (RCC) stakeholders early scoping work on outcomes a first wave of case studies with the 2 pathfinder areas   The findings are intended to help inform the rollout of the RCC programme, offering lessons on implementation for local authorities or areas and for the Department for Education, as well providing learning for the next phase of the evaluation.  "
